$comment: Per-repo config for the org source-leak-gate caller (.github/workflows/source-leak-gate.yml). This repo carries a local copy of the actions-pinned-gate engine (scripts/audit/actions-pinned-gate.mjs + its test), whose source and tests necessarily contain the version-comment markers they enforce (`# vX.Y.Z` after a pinned SHA) — exactly like the source-leak scanner's own rule definitions contain the markers it detects. The skills-drift-gate.yml caller (cinatra#188) carries the literal gate name `skills-drift-gate`, which the source-leak SLG_PLANNING_DOC rule treats as a `drift-gate` planning-artifact marker — a self-referential false positive identical in kind to the actions-pinned-gate case, mirroring the exemption cinatra-ai/ci applies to its own copy in config/self-check.json. Those files are exempted by basename. Nothing else is exempted.
